description: Legal record (#22) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 9r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 27 Tevet [5321] AM (1561 CE). The year 5321 AM is given two entries earlier and implied by the scribe here in entry #22 as סנה תארי׳. Court case recorded in the home of Yehuda ha-Dayyan regarding premarital contact between Yosef b. ʿAbd al-Ḥaqq al-Ḥawwāsh and his fiancée Trkiya(?) (תרכיה) bt. ʿAbd al-Laṭīf al-Maghribī. Multiple members of the Karaite community appear before the judges to recount having seen the couple "kissing" and "sleeping together under a single blanket." The lower lines of the document are badly damaged so it is unclear how the case was resolved regarding the couple's engagement. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
